metadata.description: Final ADA database after 3-phase automated verification. Phase-1: PubMed abstract + URL fetch. Phase-2: DailyMed SPL for FDA PDFs + wrong-PMID rescue. Phase-3: PMC full-text via PMID→PMCID conversion + brand-name DailyMed.

3.4% (30/883) of patients treated with LEQEMBI 10 mg/kg every two weeks developed treatment-emergent anti-lecanemab-irmb antibodies.
